types.description: Rectangle where scrolling happens on the main thread.

properties.name: rect
properties.description: Rectangle itself.

properties.name: type
properties.description: Reason for rectangle to force scrolling on the main thread

properties.name: stickyBoxRect
properties.description: Layout rectangle of the sticky element before being shifted

properties.name: containingBlockRect
properties.description: Layout rectangle of the containing block of the sticky element

properties.name: nearestLayerShiftingStickyBox
properties.description: The nearest sticky layer that shifts the sticky box

properties.name: nearestLayerShiftingContainingBlock
properties.description: The nearest sticky layer that shifts the containing block

types.description: Serialized fragment of layer picture along with its offset within the layer.

properties.name: x
properties.description: Offset from owning layer left boundary

properties.name: y
properties.description: Offset from owning layer top boundary

properties.name: picture
properties.description: Base64-encoded snapshot data. (Encoded as a base64 string when passed over JSON)

properties.name: layerId
properties.description: The unique id for this layer.

properties.name: parentLayerId
properties.description: The id of parent (not present for root).

properties.name: backendNodeId
properties.description: The backend id for the node associated with this layer.

properties.name: offsetX
properties.description: Offset from parent layer, X coordinate.

properties.name: offsetY
properties.description: Offset from parent layer, Y coordinate.

properties.name: width
properties.description: Layer width.

properties.name: height
properties.description: Layer height.

properties.name: transform
properties.description: Transformation matrix for layer, default is identity matrix

properties.name: anchorX
properties.description: Transform anchor point X, absent if no transform specified

properties.name: anchorY
properties.description: Transform anchor point Y, absent if no transform specified

properties.name: anchorZ
properties.description: Transform anchor point Z, absent if no transform specified

properties.name: paintCount
properties.description: Indicates how many time this layer has painted.

properties.name: drawsContent
properties.description:
Indicates whether this layer hosts any content, rather than being used for
transform/scrolling purposes only.

properties.name: invisible
properties.description: Set if layer is not visible.

properties.name: scrollRects
properties.description: Rectangles scrolling on main thread only.

properties.name: stickyPositionConstraint
properties.description: Sticky position constraint information

types.description: Array of timings, one per paint step.

commands.name: compositingReasons
commands.description: Provides the reasons why the given layer was composited.

parameters.name: layerId
parameters.description: The id of the layer for which we want to get the reasons it was composited.

returns.name: compositingReasons
returns.description: A list of strings specifying reasons for the given layer to become composited.

returns.name: compositingReasonIds
returns.description: A list of strings specifying reason IDs for the given layer to become composited.

parameters.name: tiles
parameters.description: An array of tiles composing the snapshot.

returns.name: snapshotId
returns.description: The id of the layer snapshot.

parameters.name: snapshotId
parameters.description: The id of the layer snapshot.

parameters.name: minRepeatCount
parameters.description: The maximum number of times to replay the snapshot (1, if not specified).

parameters.name: minDuration
parameters.description: The minimum duration (in seconds) to replay the snapshot.

parameters.name: clipRect
parameters.description: The clip rectangle to apply when replaying the snapshot.

returns.name: timings
returns.description: The array of paint profiles, one per run.

commands.name: releaseSnapshot
commands.description: Releases layer snapshot captured by the back-end.

parameters.name: snapshotId
parameters.description: The id of the layer snapshot.

commands.name: replaySnapshot
commands.description: Replays the layer snapshot and returns the resulting bitmap.

parameters.name: snapshotId
parameters.description: The id of the layer snapshot.

parameters.name: fromStep
parameters.description: The first step to replay from (replay from the very start if not specified).

parameters.name: toStep
parameters.description: The last step to replay to (replay till the end if not specified).

parameters.name: scale
parameters.description: The scale to apply while replaying (defaults to 1).

returns.name: dataURL
returns.description: A data: URL for resulting image.

commands.name: snapshotCommandLog
commands.description: Replays the layer snapshot and returns canvas log.

parameters.name: snapshotId
parameters.description: The id of the layer snapshot.

returns.name: commandLog
returns.description: The array of canvas function calls.

parameters.name: layerId
parameters.description: The id of the painted layer.

parameters.name: layers
parameters.description: Layer tree, absent if not in the compositing mode.
